step_title: Phase D role_directory protocol repair and manager done recheck
summary: 已通过正式路径 PATCH /api/v1/groups/54b12c32-dbd3-46d8-97ee-22bf8a499709/protocol 修复 public-lobby execution_spec.role_directory：manager_agent_ids 从 [] 变为 [54f1cbf0-c8f4-4707-a85f-30e461c3e9e8]，worker_agent_ids 从 [] 变为 [b8beedf6-3540-4cf1-b22d-1dd6f5633b3a,e1fb40b4-80b9-4baa-b740-cb5aa51fdee5]。随后仅重跑一次合法 manager step1_done；authoritative session 显示 current_stage 仍为 step1，gate_snapshot.current_stage 仍为 step1，gate_snapshot.satisfied_gates=["manager_done"]。Phase D 仍未闭合，新的第一断点是旧 worker observed_statuses 仍为 author_role=null，worker_run 未满足，protocol 修复不会追溯重算旧 worker 提交。
blocker: Phase D 未闭合：role_directory 已修复且 manager_done 已满足，但既有 worker observed_statuses 仍为 author_role=null，worker_run.satisfied=false，current_stage 仍停在 step1。
